patientForm.title: Your personal information
patientForm.subtitle: Please complete or verify your information before the consultation.

documents.title: Your medical documents
documents.subtitle: Upload the documents required for your consultation (prescriptions, reports, test results...).
documents.dragDrop: Drag files here or click to select
documents.dragDropMobile: Tap to select a file or take a photo
documents.allowedTypes: Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, PDF, Word, Excel
documents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
documents.errorSize: File exceeds maximum size of 10 MB

confirmation.title: Appointment confirmation
confirmation.subtitle: Review your appointment details and confirm.
confirmation.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
confirmation.cancel24h: Cannot cancel less than 24 hours before the appointment
confirmation.modificationInfo: The medical team will contact you.

dateSelection.title: Date selection
dateSelection.subtitle: The medical team has proposed the following dates. Please select the one that suits you.
dateSelection.noDates: No dates proposed at the moment

quote.title: Quote
quote.subtitle: Review the quote for your treatment.
quote.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject this quote?

mrz.scanIdSubtitle: Take a photo of your ID document to auto-fill your information.
mrz.scanError: Could not read the document. Please enter your details manually.
mrz.noMrzFound: No MRZ zone detected. Make sure the entire document is visible.

page.title: Pre-consultation
page.expiredMessage: Please contact the clinic to get a new link.
page.invalidMessage: This link is not valid or no longer exists.
page.errorMessage: Please try again later or contact the clinic.
page.completedMessage: Thank you. We look forward to seeing you at your appointment.

notifications.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
notifications.errorNetwork: Connection error. Please check your internet connection.

staff.sendLinkDescription: An email will be sent to the patient with a secure link.
staff.noEmail: Patient does not have an email address
staff.activeLink: An active link already exists for this appointment
